name: api-webhook
description: API-triggered routine that reacts to an external webhook payload
prompt:
An external system fired this routine via the API trigger.

Payload (raw JSON):
{apiArgs}

Do the following:
1. Parse the payload and identify what changed or what needs attention (e.g. alert id, deploy status, build number).
2. Take whatever follow-up action makes sense given the available tools — for example: open a draft PR with a proposed fix, post a summary, file an issue, or run a smoke test.
3. Briefly report what you did and why.

After installing this template, start the local API server and generate a bearer token:
  /routine-server start
  /routine-token generate api-webhook
Then POST to http://127.0.0.1:7424/routines/<id>/trigger with body `{"args": { ... }}` and `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.
